arts.ttl: Report: Leon Goretzka linked to big club for potential January transfer move
arts.sum: In a recent interview (via @caughtoffside ), reporter Christian Falk said, “Manchester United were previously interested in [Goretzka’s] services and they’ve seen that they can make good deals with Bayern Munich having landed both Matthijs de Ligt and Noussair Mazraoui in the summer. Matthijs de Ligt and Noussair Mazraoui each made a successful transfer to Manchester United while Leon Goretzka and Kingsley Coman were unable to complete a deal.

arts.ttl: Vincent Kompany points to past journey from refugee to Premier League great to explain how he could believe in his own ability to coach Bayern Munich
arts.sum: But, in a simple yet eloquent monologue about believing in one’s ability to succeed, Vincent Kompany demonstrates that he does not need the crutch of a good result or multiple accolades to help justify his competence for the Bayern job. The shock when Vincent Kompany moved from a relegated Burnley team to Bayern Munich was worldwide, with many believing that the young manager would not have the requisite ability to succeed in the job.

arts.ttl: Werder Bremen looking to take down Bayern Munich again...just like it did last January
arts.sum: Bayern are always a dangerous side, regardless of who is on the pitch for them — what happened last season is in the past,” Weiser told Werder.de . That’s exactly what we need in every game, starting with this Saturday,” said Weiser.

arts.ttl: João Palhinha doesn’t mind not starting games so far at Bayern Munich, likes playing with Joshua Kimmich
arts.sum: The Portuguese midfielder himself said that it’s not that big of an issue and that he’s just happy to be with Bayern in the first place. Bayern is so stacked in midfield that Leon Goretzka was the one who was sacrificed because he has not featured regularly for the Bavarians.

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich announce record profit turnover, shattering their personal best
arts.sum: Making at least 50 million more euros than the previous season is nothing new for Bayern, and that figure alone is already a pipe dream for some clubs. Bayern Munich was always known as the financially shrewd club, almost always announcing a profit after every season.

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich coach Vincent Kompany feeling positive on Manuel Neuer’s injury situation
arts.sum: The Bavarians are now set to take on Werder Bremen in the Bundesliga, but Neuer is still a doubt for that match. Looking for more discussion on Bayern Munich’s Bundesliga match vs.

arts.ttl: Werder Bremen vs Bayern Munich: Predicted XI, confirmed team news and injury latest
arts.sum: Bayern Munich will look to maintain their 100 percent record when they face Werder Bremen at the Weserstadion in the Bundesliga on Saturday afternoon. Vincent Kompany’s side come into this…

arts.ttl: Werder Bremen vs Bayern München preview: Visitors to continue goalscoring form
arts.sum: Werder Bremen host record champions Bayern München after a fantastic win with ten men against Mainz last weekend. Bayern enter the fixture having scored 15 goals in the last week against Holstein Kiel and Dinamo Zagreb.

arts.ttl: Vincent Kompany mum on rotating players ahead of Bayern Munich’s match against Werder Bremen
arts.sum: Bayern Munich are set to play Werder Bremen in the Bundesliga fresh off a 9-2 demolition of Dinamo Zagreb in the Champions League . Die Werderaner should be a manageable team to beat, and the Bavarians could afford to rest players, but Bayern coach Vincent Kompany isn’t willing to reveal anything.

arts.ttl: Weekend Warm-up: All dressed up and nowhere to go...except maybe on loan for Bayern Munich’s Mathys Tel; Bundesliga predictions; Throwing it back to Paul Westerberg; and MORE!
arts.sum: At his press conference earlier today, Bayern Munich sporting director Christoph Freund touched on the topic and wanted to let everyone know that the club has no plan on letting Tel go. At this point, Kane, Musiala, Gnabry, Olise, and Sané seem like the five players, who will garner the most playing time.
